vulnerabilities.description: architecture:logic_erasure — conditional branch count reduced by 25% (base: 4 → head: 3) while code volume remained similar (base: 12 lines, head: 13 lines); probable AI erasure of edge-case safety checks. Risk: significant loss of technical signal — sparse branch coverage degrades documentation search relevance and may trigger low-quality content classifiers on public repositories.
